case_title: AUSTIN, SAMUEL VS FEDERAL EXPRESS INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS INTERNATIONAL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.00, SCOTT BUNKER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; NUNC PRO TUNC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
